[2019-04-08 19:21] levktet: I just had what felt like my most epic game to date
[2019-04-08 19:22] levktet: It was long, full of units and I thought I was loosing until the first breach
[2019-04-08 19:24] levktet: Any coments on what either of us did right/wrong, and how it could be improve would be appreciated
[2019-04-08 19:31] levktet: or to improve my gamestate reading, since I didn't expect that result
[2019-04-08 19:32] zera777 (Zera): On Turn 13 chesh gets 4 damage, even though he's attacking with 4 D-mechs, 2 Tarsiers, and a Splitter. Shouldn't that be 11? Is this a bug?
[2019-04-08 19:33] cachotognax: there's not even the aopllo's *
[2019-04-08 19:33] zera777 (Zera): He killed a Conduit with Apollo.
[2019-04-08 19:33] amalloy: @Zera hannibull is frontline
[2019-04-08 19:33] cachotognax: it still part of next turn's threat
[2019-04-08 19:36] zera777 (Zera): I'd say building Zemora was the correct choice. Especially since your opponent decided to go for hyper econ and didn't build their own.
[2019-04-08 19:38] amalloy: @Zera didn't you just watch the replay? the username is right there
[2019-04-08 19:44] levktet: thanks. I got worried it might not have ben the right choice since he got away with high econ and was killing my conduits, but I still got some Zemora activations
[2019-04-08 19:45] amalloy: i could be wrong, but i don't love your apollo, @levktet . it seems like a big investment against an opponent who can build mostly doomed mechs and hannibulls, and it comes at a time when you needed green more badly than blue
[2019-04-08 19:48] levktet: I can see that. By that point I was panic-copying my opponent, thinking he had read the set better than me
[2019-04-08 19:49] levktet: I could've gone by with 2 b for the doomed mechs or double hannibull and more green for zamora

--- Thread (14 messages, 2019-04-11 to 2019-04-12) ---
[2019-04-11 23:48] zera777 (Zera): pRNxd-LXXXV This is the second Galvantima game I've lost hard. What should I do?
[2019-04-11 23:53] f300xen (f0x): stop buying bad units like steelsplitter and gauss cannon
[2019-04-11 23:59] zera777 (Zera): Is it possible to win without firing Antima first? Because the opponent's Antima killed all the engis that would've fueled my Antima, and that feels unfair, like I took double damage.
[2019-04-12 00:01] willflame: yes, if the opponent gets Antima too early and you buy a lot of pre-emptive defence
[2019-04-12 00:02] totally_not_fbi (Totally Not FBI): Yes, if you don’t counter-tima
[2019-04-12 00:02] totally_not_fbi (Totally Not FBI): i.e. buying antima the turn after your opponent does
[2019-04-12 00:07] zera777 (Zera): I guess the next question would be, how do you figure out when to build Antima?
[2019-04-12 00:08] willflame: here imo Antima is the best "attacker" so you'd want to get it fairly early
[2019-04-12 00:09] willflame: plus you're using Galvani's as your main source of econ so getting Antima first is also a plus since you destroy their econ
[2019-04-12 00:10] willflame: often i start fast Antima builds with Conduit and then get BA on the same turn since i can store green but blue/red require me to spend gold
[2019-04-12 00:11] willflame: oh hey that's exactly what ABPoker did (just looking at the replay now)
[2019-04-12 00:12] willflame: if you've resigned yourself to having second Antima, i would've just bought Walls and Innervi Fields to tank it out and then counter Antima later with a larger econ
[2019-04-12 00:13] willflame: having an Antima 1/2 turn behind is really bad because of the exact reason you mentioned above (the opponent's Antima killed all the engis that would've fueled my Antima)
[2019-04-12 00:13] willflame: plus having second Antima means you could transition into Cauterizers for even more engi's

--- Thread (25 messages, 2019-04-17) ---
[2019-04-17 03:41] mrguy888: Before watching I predict you bought a whole bunch of Steelsplitters and Goose Cannons.
[2019-04-17 03:42] mrguy888: Even worse, you bought vai.
[2019-04-17 03:47] camzace: how come vai is bad? it seems useful vs centurion/arka - is it just because both absorbers exist so the freeze becomes pointless, or the set just doesn't support it?
[2019-04-17 03:48] camzace: oh so its a fault of the unit itself?
[2019-04-17 03:48] mrguy888: Vai isn't bad, second animus is bad.
[2019-04-17 03:49] camzace: so there's no sink for the 2nd animus
[2019-04-17 03:49] mrguy888: You buy second animus for ampo or lucy but you shouldn't be buying second animus for Vai, even when it looks amazing.
[2019-04-17 03:49] mrguy888: The unit is pretty weak for a double animus unit.
[2019-04-17 03:50] camzace: is vai better here if either arka or centurion isn't in the set?
[2019-04-17 03:50] mrguy888: Oh, you mean one or the other. No since you click the arka anyway.
[2019-04-17 03:51] camzace: oh there's a dgrid too
[2019-04-17 03:51] mrguy888: Second absorber is only good when the absorber is fine as soak.
[2019-04-17 03:52] camzace: even if opp buys vai?
[2019-04-17 03:52] mrguy888: Surely he shouldn't have bought the second forge after buying the second animus though.
[2019-04-17 03:52] mrguy888: Well buying both vs not vai is so dumb I didn't think I needed to specify that it is vs vai.
[2019-04-17 03:53] camzace: feels like we lose a lot of value if our only absorber gets denied by vai
[2019-04-17 03:53] mrguy888: With the 1 extra vai freeze and the threat of forking, you are spending way too much on too little tempo
[2019-04-17 03:54] camzace: plus opp is already very behind going for vai
[2019-04-17 03:54] mrguy888: Wall is still there to absorb.
[2019-04-17 03:55] mrguy888: Vai is doing 5 damage for 13BRRRR plus some threat.
[2019-04-17 03:55] mrguy888: Ferritin and the big freezes should be enough to make vai correct that set, I was mostly making a joke.
[2019-04-17 03:56] camzace: so isn't it worth making another big absorber to deny 3 damage from vai?
[2019-04-17 03:56] mrguy888: It is if the second absorber is happy as soak.
[2019-04-17 03:57] camzace: which is really only the case with wall
[2019-04-17 03:57] mrguy888: You would prioritize making sure you always had an infusion grid up for sure.

Typically the most important mistake in deciding games is the first mistake so such a big difference in opinion on turn 1 is what you should be looking at.

messages.content: mrguy's answer is better though because it encourages self-service
